MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES WERE STATED.
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories set #1 as to defendant H.B. Fuller Company:
Defendant's general objections and preliminary statement are ordered stricken. There is no provision in the Code of Civil Procedure for general objections.
2 - 7
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond further. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to entering into a stipulated protective order.
8-14
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond further. If defendant never manufactured or sold Foster 8199 that representation shall be verified.
15 - 21
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond further. If defendant first offered CP10 for sale at some point in 2000, any response shall comply with CCP 2030.220. Defendant is ordered to respond further. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to entering into a stipulated protective order.
22 - 39
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to respond further. If defendant lacks sufficient information to fully respond, any response shall comply with CCP 2030.220.
Further responses are to be provided within 21 days of notice of this order. The request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
